title: The Uncle Howee Show
description: Uncle Howee and Loomis the rabbit are your friends! Join them for a song on the piano and antics that will suck you in.
parent: R. L. Stine’s The Haunting Hour: The Series
altHero: Uncle Howee, man with glasses, plaid jacket, and red bowtie, at the piano with his puppet rabbit friend Loomis
alt2: Uncle Howee smashing a pie in another man’s face
alt4: Uncle Howee with a life-sized teen boy marionette
